	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element ">
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>To cater to the large volume of patients coming from the southern part of the state, a centre was established at Tirunelveli in 1988. It has facilities to accommodate 150 paying and 350 free patients. The hospital is an accredited teaching institution. Aravind Eye Hospital, Tirunelveli, has been operating from its new building with advanced facilities, located within the same campus, since 16th April 2023. However, the old building has been renovated and continues to house some of the speciality services.</p>
